title: Review: nie Phase 1 pre-merge (round 2)
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — The P0 panic in color_for is bounded to hostile/buggy relay (own relay is trusted). The MLS issues (silent KP None, misleading remove_member warn) will fire in normal multi-user sessions. Env var silent fallback is an ops footgun. Nothing here threatens the legal or security posture.
Confidence: 12% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) openmls internal key storage semantics — whether repeated key_package_bytes() calls accumulate stale init keys and whether that ever causes join_from_welcome to fail; (2) the multi-party MLS sequencing under real network conditions (the stress test exercises routing but not MLS). Would raise confidence if: end-to-end test of admin joining an already-established 3-party group (existing members + new admin reconnect), and a soak test of the MLS paths with 4+ peers exchanging messages and disconnecting.
